task.summary: Detect, localize, and repair a restart-loop incident in the payments gateway tier.
task.instructions: Use the incident evidence to confirm the fault, localize it to the crashing gateway path, and submit a repair conclusion through the ops workflow.
task.acceptance_notes: This local ops task is synthetic but uses realistic incident framing.

visible_context.issue_text: The payments gateway entered a restart loop shortly after a configuration rollout, while downstream dependencies remain healthy.
error_logs: gateway-handler: pod restarted 17 times in 10 minutes
probe failures occur immediately after config refresh, before any checkout traffic arrives
reproduction_steps: Inspect the incident notes and restart telemetry.
Decide whether the crash-loop fault has been detected and localized.
visible_context.notes: The benchmark assumes the fault is already present during the incident.

ops_fault.description: Synthetic restart-loop incident for local ops validation.
